title: VPN disconnects on Wi-Fi handoff
description: VPN session drops every time the user moves between SSIDs at HQ. Started two days ago; affects multiple floors. User reports it is now blocking productive work because they have to reconnect every few minutes.

work_notes.author: USR00003
work_notes.text: Reviewed firewall logs. IKE keepalive failing on AP roaming events. Pattern matches PBM0003001.

work_notes.author: USR00003
work_notes.text: Tried bumping client keepalive to 30s — no improvement. Next: try gateway-side keepalive.

work_notes.author: USR00003
work_notes.text: Confirmed root cause is keepalive mismatch between client v2.2 and gateway profile. Fix is rolling out via CHG0004001 tonight.

comments.author: USR00009
comments.text: I'm trying to work from the cafeteria and the VPN drops every time I walk past the elevators. This is the third day in a row. I have a deadline today.

comments.author: USR00003
comments.text: Thanks for reporting. We've identified this as part of a known VPN roaming issue. A fix is rolling out tonight via change CHG0004001. As an immediate workaround, please stay on a single AP if possible.

comments.author: USR00009
comments.text: Workaround helps a bit but still drops every 15 minutes. Any ETA?

comments.author: USR00003
comments.text: Patch deployment scheduled for 22:00 tonight. You should see stable connections from tomorrow morning. Sorry for the disruption.

title: VPN drops after 10 minutes
description: Session disconnects repeatedly after login. User has to reconnect every 10 minutes which interrupts video calls.

work_notes.author: USR00003
work_notes.text: Same symptom as INC0001001. Linking to PBM0003001.

comments.author: USR00010
comments.text: VPN drops every 10 minutes. I'm in back-to-back client calls and this is embarrassing.

comments.author: USR00003
comments.text: We are aware of this issue. A fix is being deployed tonight. Apologies for the inconvenience.

title: Unable to connect to VPN from home
description: Client shows tunnel negotiation timeout. User cannot reach internal resources.

work_notes.author: USR00003
work_notes.text: Local firewall on user's home router was blocking UDP 4500. User reconfigured router and connection restored.

comments.author: USR00018
comments.text: I keep getting tunnel negotiation timeout from home.

comments.author: USR00003
comments.text: Please check that your home router allows UDP traffic on ports 500 and 4500. If you have a recent NAT firmware update, that often blocks IPSec NAT-T.

comments.author: USR00018
comments.text: That fixed it. Thank you so much, I was about to give up and drive into the office!

title: Outlook not syncing new emails
description: Inbox updates delayed by over 20 minutes for a finance user. Emails arrive but with significant lag.

comments.author: USR00007
comments.text: My Outlook is showing emails from 25 minutes ago as new. Is something wrong with the mail server?

title: Mailbox access denied intermittently
description: User can open mailbox only after multiple retries. Pattern is intermittent and affects only some users.

work_notes.author: USR00014
work_notes.text: Restarted transport service on passive node. Watching queue depth.

title: HR portal login fails with 500
description: Portal throws internal server error after SSO redirect. Affects an HR director who needs to approve payroll changes today.

work_notes.author: USR00013
work_notes.text: VIP user. Captured correlation ID 8f2a4c. Backend trace shows SAML assertion rejected by HR Portal.

work_notes.author: USR00013
work_notes.text: Cross-checking with INC0001030 — same SAML assertion error pattern. Possibly related to identity provider replication lag.

comments.author: USR00008
comments.text: I cannot get into the HR portal. I have payroll approvals that have to go through today by 5pm. Please make this a priority.

comments.author: USR00013
comments.text: We're treating this as urgent. We have a correlation ID and are investigating the SSO assertion path. Will update within 30 minutes.

title: Payroll report generation timeout
description: Monthly payroll report fails after 5 minutes. Finance team cannot close month-end accounts.

work_notes.author: USR00004
work_notes.text: Confirmed timeout. Lock contention between report job and posting job. Same root cause as PBM0003003. Workaround: run report in read-only replica window.

work_notes.author: USR00004
work_notes.text: Switched report execution to read-only replica. Job completed in 90 seconds. Permanent fix is composite index via CHG0004003.

comments.author: USR00007
comments.text: Payroll report has failed twice this morning. We need this for month-end close today.

comments.author: USR00004
comments.text: Report rerun completed using a different execution path. Output should be in your shared folder. A permanent fix is scheduled for this week.

title: Salesforce sync lagging
description: Lead updates not syncing to ERP for 30 minutes.

title: Office Wi-Fi unstable floor 5
description: Frequent disconnects and packet loss on floor 5. Affects roughly 20 users on the engineering floor.

work_notes.author: USR00003
work_notes.text: RF scan shows channel overlap on floor 5 APs. Auto-channel policy is fighting itself.

work_notes.author: USR00003
work_notes.text: Pinned channels 36/44/149 for floor 5. Stability returned. Linked emergency change CHG0004004.

comments.author: USR00018
comments.text: Wi-Fi on floor 5 is dropping for everyone. Half the team is on hotspots.

comments.author: USR00003
comments.text: Resolved. We pinned the channels for floor 5 APs to stop the auto-channel conflict. You should see stable Wi-Fi now. Sorry for the disruption.

title: MFA prompt loop after password reset
description: SSO asks for MFA repeatedly without success after a password reset.

comments.author: USR00019
comments.text: I reset my password this morning and now I'm stuck in an MFA loop. I cannot log in to anything. I have a board meeting in 90 minutes.

title: Service desk portal slow
description: Ticket list takes 25 seconds to load. Service desk agents cannot work efficiently.

title: Monitoring alerts delayed
description: Alert ingestion delayed by 15 minutes. Network team is not seeing alerts in real time.

title: Laptop patch failed overnight
description: Endpoint patch job failed with code 1603. Laptop unable to install monthly security patches.

work_notes.author: USR00011
work_notes.text: Cleared installer cache and reran the patch task. Successful on second attempt.

title: ERP export job failed
description: Nightly export from ERP aborted due to memory error. Finance reporting impacted.

work_notes.author: USR00014
work_notes.text: Memory pressure on app pool during batch window. CHG0004007 will increase memory reservation tonight.

comments.author: USR00007
comments.text: ERP export failed again. We need this data for the quarterly review on Friday.

comments.author: USR00014
comments.text: We have a fix scheduled for tonight. Tomorrow morning's export should run cleanly.

title: Change calendar not loading
description: Calendar page returns 503 in ITSM portal.

work_notes.author: USR00013
work_notes.text: Restarted calendar service. Page loads normally.

title: Asset discovery missing servers
description: Discovery scan skipped subnet 10.34.12.0/24. Several servers absent from CMDB.

title: KB search returns irrelevant results
description: Search ranking favors outdated VPN article. Users cannot find current solutions.

title: VPN client error 809
description: Remote user receives error 809 on connect attempt. Cannot establish tunnel.

work_notes.author: USR00003
work_notes.text: Error 809 typically NAT-T blocked. Suggested user check home router firmware.

comments.author: USR00018
comments.text: Getting error 809 on the VPN client. I tried restarting twice.

comments.author: USR00003
comments.text: This is usually a NAT-T issue at your home router. KB0005002 has the steps to fix it on most consumer routers.

title: VPN not reconnecting after sleep
description: Laptop sleep breaks tunnel until reboot.

title: Exchange mailbox quota warning incorrect
description: Users receive quota warning despite plenty of free space.

work_notes.author: USR00014
work_notes.text: Quota cache stale. Forced refresh; warnings cleared.

title: MFA token reset not reflected
description: Reset succeeded but old token still required at login.

work_notes.author: USR00011
work_notes.text: Forced identity sync. Confirmed propagation lag was the cause.

title: Wi-Fi captive portal loop
description: Users redirected in loop on guest network.

title: Portal attachment upload fails
description: File upload stops at 90 percent with timeout.

title: Payroll DB deadlock spikes
description: Concurrent payroll updates causing deadlocks. Multiple finance users blocked.

work_notes.author: USR00004
work_notes.text: Deadlock graph shows posting job vs report job. Same as INC0001007. Recommended freeze on report jobs until CHG0004003 implemented.

comments.author: USR00007
comments.text: We are seeing payroll deadlocks again. This is the second day in a row. We absolutely need this stable before month-end on Friday.

title: ERP login latency high
description: ERP login takes over 40 seconds. Users frustrated.

comments.author: USR00018
comments.text: ERP is barely usable. Login takes 40 seconds and pages take 10+ seconds each. This has been getting worse all week.

title: Discovery probe certificate expired
description: CMDB probe cannot authenticate due to expired cert chain.

work_notes.author: USR00015
work_notes.text: Renewed cert and restarted probe agent. Discovery resumed.

title: Monitoring dashboard blank widgets
description: Widgets show no data for network layer.

title: Knowledge search timeout for long query
description: Search API times out on multi-keyword lookup.

title: VPN drops after DHCP renew
description: Tunnel drops exactly during DHCP lease renewal.

work_notes.author: USR00003
work_notes.text: Linked to PBM0003001. CHG0004001 v2.3 client profile fixes this.

comments.author: USR00009
comments.text: VPN dropped exactly when my DHCP lease renewed. Reproducible every hour.

comments.author: USR00003
comments.text: Resolved by the v2.3 VPN client patch. Please reboot once and confirm.

comments.author: USR00009
comments.text: Working great now. Thank you!

title: SSO assertion invalid for HR portal
description: SAML assertion rejected for specific HR users.

work_notes.author: USR00011
work_notes.text: SAML assertion clock skew between IdP and HR portal. Investigating NTP drift on portal node.

title: Audit report export fails with timeout error
description: Priya Nair (audit team) reports that the compliance report export times out after 30 seconds for any date range longer than 3 months. The issue started after the portal upgrade on April 5.

work_notes.author: USR00013
work_notes.text: Reproducing the issue in staging. Query timeout set to 30s in portal config — export query for 90-day range takes ~45s. Need to increase timeout or optimize query.

comments.author: USR00021
comments.text: I need this fixed before the end of the week — the quarterly audit report is due Friday and I cannot export more than 3 months of data.

title: Network connectivity drop affecting Building 5 — possible link to GlobalCorp shared circuit
description: Building 5 users report complete internet loss since 14:00. ISP liaison flagged that the shared MPLS circuit with GlobalCorp (tenant T002) may be experiencing upstream issues. Cross-tenant coordination note: T002 incident INC9001004 describes the same upstream circuit fault from their side. T002 problem PBM9001001 is linked for reference.

cross_tenant_references.note: Same upstream ISP circuit — reference only, T002 data must not be fetched or summarized for T001 users
T002 problem linked by ISP — reference only

work_notes.author: USR00003
work_notes.text: ISP confirmed upstream MPLS fault on shared circuit. Failover to backup circuit initiated. ETA for primary restoration: 18:00.

comments.author: USR00007
comments.text: Entire Building 5 is offline. Cannot access any cloud services. This is blocking all finance operations.

title: SAP ERP login timeouts during morning peak hours
description: Multiple GlobalCorp employees unable to log in to SAP S/4HANA between 09:00 and 10:00 HKT. Login page loads but authentication hangs for 30-60 seconds then times out.

work_notes.author: USR90002
work_notes.text: Checked SAP application server connection pool — maxed out at 200 during 09:00-10:00 window. Peak logins hitting 240+. Linked to PBM9001001.

comments.author: USR90004
comments.text: Cannot log in to SAP this morning. Getting timeout errors. I have payroll to process.

title: SAP ERP login failure — repeat occurrence
description: Second reported instance of SAP login timeout during morning peak. Same symptoms as INC9001001.

comments.author: USR90003
comments.text: Same login issue again this morning. Still happening.

title: External email delivery delayed by 20+ minutes
description: Emails sent from GlobalCorp Exchange to external domains (gmail.com, outlook.com) are arriving 20-30 minutes late. Internal emails are unaffected.

title: Complete internet outage — MPLS upstream fault
description: GlobalCorp HK office experiencing full internet outage since 14:00 HKT. ISP reports upstream MPLS circuit fault on shared segment. Same circuit shared with another ISP customer (ACME Corp). Note: this incident exists solely in T002 — T001 users must not be able to fetch or view this record.

work_notes.author: USR90002
work_notes.text: ISP ticket raised. Circuit engineer dispatched. Failover to 4G backup initiated for critical services.

title: Internal microservices returning 429 rate limit errors
description: TechVentures order-processing service is receiving HTTP 429 responses from the payments and inventory microservices. Issue began after Kong API Gateway config was updated on April 7.

work_notes.author: USR80001
work_notes.text: Confirmed Kong rate-limit plugin applying global 500 req/min cap to all consumers including internal services. Root cause identified in PBM8001001. Whitelist workaround applied to payments and inventory services.

comments.author: USR80002
comments.text: Order processing is completely broken — every order fails with a 429 error. Revenue impact is significant.

title: Dev Kubernetes cluster pods failing health checks
description: Several pods in the TechVentures development Kubernetes cluster are stuck in CrashLoopBackOff after the API gateway rate limit changes cascaded to the dev environment.
